Class Summary 
Class Description
ChatRoom
ChatRoom entity class.
ChatRoomHandler
This class contains static methods to create, delete and find ChatRoom instances in the PostgreSQL database.
ChatRoomHandlerTest  
Client
Client entity class.
ClientHandler
This class handles incoming client connection, enables sending and receiving messages from client.
HibernateUtils
This class contains static methods which utilize Hibernate framework.
HibernateUtilsTest  
Message
Message entity class.
Server
This class contains methods where new instance of ServerSocket is created.
ServerTest  
ServerWindow
This is the main class for this application.
